Agentic AI, Open AI GPT 4o, Agentic Workflow (Prefect), LLM Guardrails, Multi-Agent Orchestration, Detailed agent's fetures:  Data Ingestion Agent – Collects customer feedback from multiple internal and external channels and prepares it for AI processing. Interaction Processing Agent – Cleans, structures, and processes raw data such as call transcripts, comments, and survey responses. Knowledge Retrieval Agent – Retrieves relevant enterprise knowledge and historical information to provide context for analysis. Sentiment & Intent Analysis Agent– Identifies customer sentiment, intent, and key topics within the feedback data. Insight Generation Agent – Detects patterns and recurring service issues across large volumes of customer interactions. AI Reasoning Agent – Performs deeper analysis to identify root causes and prioritize issues based on impact. Recommendation Agent – Generates actionable recommendations to improve services and address customer concerns. Workflow Orchestration Agent – Coordinates the execution of different AI agents and manages the end-to-end analysis workflow. Enterprise Integration Agent – Connects VOC insights with enterprise systems to trigger actions such as ticket creation and reporting. Governance & Guardrail Agent – Ensures AI outputs follow policy guidelines, maintain accuracy, and comply with enterprise standards.
